info.title: Dradis Pro API
info.description: REST API for Dradis Pro, an open-source collaboration and reporting platform for information security teams. Manages projects, nodes, issues, evidence, notes, content blocks, document properties, tags, and attachments. Uses Token-based authentication and project scoping via Dradis-Project-Id header.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (25 results per page)

get.summary: List all nodes in a project

parameters.name: Dradis-Project-Id
parameters.description: Project ID to scope the request
